title: Xiphion donianum
taxonomy: Xiphion donianum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. It belongs to the genus Xiphion, which is a small group of irises native to the Mediterranean region. The family Iridaceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as irises. Xiphion donianum is further classified as a monocot, meaning it has one cotyledon (seed leaf) in its seedling stage. This classification reflects the plant's unique characteristics and evolutionary history.
